news.t: Real Estate ETFs Bounce From Key Support

holdings.infoBox: DRN is an equity ETF with a total of 40 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 22.62%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 8.51%, Real Estate Select Sector Index Swap at 7.75%, Real Estate Select Sector Index Swap at 7.11%, and Welltower at 6.85%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Real Estate Bull 3X ETF (DRN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Real Estate Select Sector index. The fund provides 3x leveraged exposure to an index that captures large cap equities of the US real estate segment. DRN was launched on Jul 16, 2009 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Real Estate ETFs Bounce From Key Support
data.text: Real estate sits among the market's top-performing sectors in 2019. Join the momentum by trading a pullback in these real estate ETFs.
